projectDescription: A Python desktop application that reads Dwarf Fortress game logs and displays filtered announcements and combat reports in a separate, customizable window.
keyFeatures: Real-time Dwarf Fortress announcement display in a separate window
Dual-pane display for announcements and combat reports simultaneously
Regex-based announcement filtering with customizable groups and categories
Per-window visibility toggle for each announcement category
Custom word highlighting with configurable foreground and background colors
Font and size customization per display window
Session persistence: reload previous announcements on startup
Memory management via announcement trimming per category
Always-on-top and borderless window lock mode
Cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux) with Python 2.7+ and Python 3
publicApiSurface: run.py — entry point to launch the application
Settings.cfg — configuration file with gamelog_path, load_previous_announcements, save_hidden_announcements, trim_announcements_0/1, and [Colors] section
